title: fWhips Fwabulous Modpack
description: All mods that fWhip uses in his Hardcore Single-player World!
body:
fWhips Fwabulous Modpack is a modpack that conatains all of fWhips mods that he uses on his Hardcore Forever World! This pack will be updated to whenever fWhip updates his list of Mods!

Every Month the Modpack will be updated with the up-to-date mods and new versions will come out every update! (maybe a day after!)

Any Issues? Contact me on discord: Panex1_ 

Please dont contact fWhip or any of his amazing staff about this modpack. Since they are not on the server to provide mod support
